_comments.chunk_size: How many tasks the orchestrator hands to one architect run. Keep small (1-3) to avoid context drift. CLI arg overrides this.
_comments.validation_command: Optional shell command run in the worktree after a READY verdict. Example: 'npm run typecheck' or 'pnpm test -- --run unit/foo.test.ts'. If null, gate is skipped. If set and it fails, the iteration is downgraded to NEEDS_WORK.
_comments.validation_timeout_seconds: Hard cap for the validation command.
